name: Dihydrocodeine
summary: A weak semi-synthetic opioid analgesic and antitussive (anti-cough) drug. Often sold as a syrup in combination with aspirin or paracetamol. Not to be confused with the slightly less potent codeine.

legacy.addictionPotential: moderately addictive with a high potential for abuse

tolerance.full: develops with prolonged and repeated use

toxicities: potentially lethal when mixed with depressants like alcohol or benzodiazepines
